title: heyfood audio transcription response v1
description: Success body returned when a captured WAV is transcribed server-side. The audio is transcribed and discarded; it is never retained.

transcript.description: The recognized text of the recording.

duration_seconds.description: Length of the submitted audio, derived from the WAV header.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the transcript (e.g. "en").

model_version.description: Opaque transcription version tag (e.g. "hf-transcribe-1"). Not a provider or model identifier; treat it as a stable, meaningless-to-parse label.
